markdown:
#  Which fields in the Drawings tool can be configured as required, optional, or hidden? 
##  Background 
Certain fields in the Drawings tool can be configured as required, optional, or hidden. For example, if you want to make Drawing Date required and hide the Received Date field, you can configure these preferences in the Company level Admin tool and then apply them to one or more projects. See [Create New Configurable Fieldsets](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-new-configurable-fieldsets).
##  Answer 
The table below details which fields can be configured for the project's Drawings tool:
_Note:_
  * A GREEN checkmark ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12) indicates the field can be configured to this setting.
  * A RED 'x' ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12) indicates the field cannot be configured to this setting.
  * A field name in GRAY italics indicates the field cannot be configured from its default setting.

  
| Drawing Date  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| _Drawing Set_  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |  
| Received Date  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |  
| _Revision_  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12)  | ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |

title: Which fields in the Drawings tool can be configured as required, optional, or hidden?
description: This table lists the fields in the Drawings tool that can be configured as required, optional, or hidden by Company Admins.
